narrative.headline: What 2022 Volkswagen Atlas owners complain about most
narrative.summary: Owners filed 164 complaints with NHTSA for the 2022 Volkswagen Atlas. Engine problems lead the list at 28% of reports, with brake and electrical issues close behind. A few reports mention a crash or a fire. Here are the five most common problem areas.

issues.sample: While driving in stop and go city traffic with the auto start/stop disengaged, the vehicle completely shut off while in drive. After releasing the brakes to proceed in traffic I was unable to control the vehicle or accelerate. The vehicle indicated that it needed to be placed in
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: The most reported area, with 46 complaints (28% of all reports). One report involved a fire. No crashes or injuries were reported.
